zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance Gerrard於大約1402年出生在英國藍卡爾布萊恩時，她的父親Sir John Gerard of Bryn23歲，母親Alice Boteler26歲。她於1422年與Sir Alexander Standish在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1469年在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance Gerrard于大约1402年出生在英国藍卡爾布萊恩时，她的父亲Sir John Gerard of Bryn23岁，母亲Alice Boteler26岁。她于1422年与Sir Alexander Standish在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1469年在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gerrard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gerard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Jean-Pierre, Murielle, Emile, Pascal, Pierre, Agathe, Alain, Aldes, Antoine, Armand.

French (Gérard), Walloon (mainly Gérard), and English (of Norman origin): from the personal name Gérard, Gerard (from Old French Gerart, Girart), composed of the ancient Germanic elements gēr ‘spear, lance’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. As a surname of French origin it is also found in Haiti. Compare Garrard and also French Guerard , English Garard , Gerrard , and Jarrard .

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Constance Gerrard was born about 1402, in Bryn, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir John Gerard of Bryn, was 23 and her mother, Alice Boteler, was 26. She married Sir Alexander Standish in 1422, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1469, in Standish, Lancashire, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance Gerrard est née environ 1402, à Bryn, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Gerard of Bryn, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice Boteler, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Alexander Standish en 1422, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1469, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance Gerrard um 1402 in Bryn, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Gerard of Bryn 23 und ihre Mutter Alice Boteler 26. Sie hat 1422 in England, United Kingdom Sir Alexander Standish geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1469 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Standish, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Gerrard è nata il circa 1402 nel Bryn, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir John Gerard of Bryn, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Alice Boteler, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Alexander Standish nel 1422, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1469, nel Standish, Lancashire, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance Gerrardが約1402年にイギリスランカシュアイアブリンで生まれた時，父Sir John Gerard of Brynは23歳，母Alice Botelerは26歳であった。1422年にイギリスイギリスでSir Alexander Standishと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1469年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance Gerrard(이)가 대략 1402년 영국 랭카실르 브린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Gerard of Bryn(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Boteler(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1422년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Alexander Standish(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1469년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Gerrard nasceu aproximadamente 1402, em Bryn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Gerard of Bryn, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Alice Boteler, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Alexander Standish em 1422, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1469, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance Gerrard родилась около 1402 г. в местности брин, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Gerard of Bryn было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Boteler, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Alexander Standish в 1422 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1469 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Constance Gerrard nació aproximadamente 1402, en Bryn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Gerard of Bryn, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Alice Boteler, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Alexander Standish en 1422, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1469, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
